# Ghulam Mujtaba — Portfolio

> Full Stack Developer, Data Scientist, and AI Specialist based in Lahore, Pakistan

## About

Ghulam Mujtaba is a technical founder, software engineer, and AI specialist. He has 3+ years of experience training and evaluating large language models for Meta and FANG-tier companies via Appen. He is the founder of Megicode (software consultancy) and co-founder of CampusAxis (university platform serving 260+ Pakistani universities).

- **Education**: Bachelor of Software Engineering, COMSATS University Islamabad, Lahore Campus (expected 2026)
- **Location**: Lahore, Punjab, Pakistan
- **Email**: ghulammujtaba1005@gmail.com
- **Site**: https://ghulammujtaba.com

## Site Structure

- [Home](https://ghulammujtaba.com) — overview, hero, skills, contact
- [About](https://ghulammujtaba.com/about) — biography, languages, tools, and background
- [Resume](https://ghulammujtaba.com/resume) — experience, education, and certifications
- [Projects](https://ghulammujtaba.com/projects) — real-world products built for clients and startups
- [Articles](https://ghulammujtaba.com/articles) — technical writing on full stack development, AI, and startups

## Skills

**Full Stack Development**: JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Next.js, Node.js, Python, Java, Spring Boot, MERN Stack
**AI / ML**: TensorFlow, PyTorch, Scikit-learn, OpenCV, LLM Evaluation, Data Annotation, Search Relevance
**Mobile**: React Native, Flutter
**Infrastructure & Cloud**: AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, MongoDB, PostgreSQL
**Design**: Figma, UI/UX Design (Google certified)

## Certifications

- Google Advanced Data Analytics Professional Certificate
- Google UX Design Professional Certificate
- Meta Front-End Developer Professional Certificate
- Google Cybersecurity Professional Certificate
- Google Project Management Professional Certificate
- Google Data Analytics Professional Certificate
- Aspire AI-Integrated Leadership Program (Harvard faculty)

## Notable Projects

- **CampusAxis** — comprehensive university portal connecting students, faculty, and administration across 260+ Pakistani universities
- **MegiLance** — AI + blockchain powered freelancing platform (Final Year Project)
- **PakUni App** — university discovery and comparison mobile app for Pakistan
- **HealSmart** — AI-assisted mobile health application
- **Aesthetics Clinic** — full website and management system for a medical aesthetics clinic
